records.m_Talk_ENG: I had countless dreams while I was frozen asleep.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I had countless dreams while I was frozen asleep.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I had countless dreams while I was frozen asleep.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One was a dream of resentment where pitch-black shadows would blame me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One was a dream of resentment where pitch-black shadows would blame me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One was a dream of resentment where pitch-black shadows would blame me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how much I tried to run away, they kept pulling me in closer like a deep swamp, and never let me go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how much I tried to run away, they kept pulling me in closer like a deep swamp, and never let me go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how much I tried to run away, they kept pulling me in closer like a deep swamp, and never let me go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My body was asleep, but my mind was wide awake. And I only realized it after I opened my eyes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My body was asleep, but my mind was wide awake. And I only realized it after I opened my eyes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My body was asleep, but my mind was wide awake. And I only realized it after I opened my eyes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I realized that I had fallen into hell for the sin of forgetting my comrades.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I realized that I had fallen into hell for the sin of forgetting my comrades.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I realized that I had fallen into hell for the sin of forgetting my comrades.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A sin of forgetting my comrades and not being able to protect what I should've...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A sin of forgetting my comrades and not being able to protect what I should've...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A sin of forgetting my comrades and not being able to protect what I should've...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe this reality is the punishment that suited me the best.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe this reality is the punishment that suited me the best.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe this reality is the punishment that suited me the best.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I still... can't recall the names of those who blame me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I still... can't recall the names of those who blame me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I still... can't recall the names of those who blame me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you think so too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you think so too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you think so too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was expecting you'd show up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was expecting you'd show up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was expecting you'd show up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How do you know my past self?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How do you know my past self?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How do you know my past self?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you already guessed that far?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you already guessed that far?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you already guessed that far?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You must really be Aditya.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You must really be Aditya.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You must really be Aditya.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tell me why you want me, and why you are now brazenly showing your face.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tell me why you want me, and why you are now brazenly showing your face.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tell me why you want me, and why you are now brazenly showing your face.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wanted to remind you that you can't do anything alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wanted to remind you that you can't do anything alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wanted to remind you that you can't do anything alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And, as expected... that you will be alone without us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And, as expected... that you will be alone without us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And, as expected... that you will be alone without us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The cries of my comrades, begging me to save them. Asha, and the C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The cries of my comrades, begging me to save them. Asha, and the C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The cries of my comrades, begging me to save them. Asha, and the C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's hard to believe that they have nothing to do with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's hard to believe that they have nothing to do with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's hard to believe that they have nothing to do with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I will ask again. Why do you want me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I will ask again. Why do you want me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I will ask again. Why do you want me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You gave me a new name, Ravi, when I was wandering the desert after becoming a Counter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You gave me a new name, Ravi, when I was wandering the desert after becoming a Counter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You gave me a new name, Ravi, when I was wandering the desert after becoming a Counter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was your trusty comrade and your flame.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was your trusty comrade and your flame.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was your trusty comrade and your flame.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have appeared in front of you on behalf of everyone who wishes to be by your side forever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have appeared in front of you on behalf of everyone who wishes to be by your side forever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have appeared in front of you on behalf of everyone who wishes to be by your side forever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone else is waiting for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone else is waiting for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone else is waiting for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The purification target is a colossal C.O. of an unknown type.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The purification target is a colossal C.O. of an unknown type.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The purification target is a colossal C.O. of an unknown type.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since it has appeared in the Normalside and affected it, we must purify it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since it has appeared in the Normalside and affected it, we must purify it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since it has appeared in the Normalside and affected it, we must purify it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm aware we are not in a suitable position to fight. Yet, we must go forth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm aware we are not in a suitable position to fight. Yet, we must go forth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm aware we are not in a suitable position to fight. Yet, we must go forth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, everyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, everyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, everyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Especially to you, Ravi. Didn't you say you wanted to go traveling with your daughter?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Especially to you, Ravi. Didn't you say you wanted to go traveling with your daughter?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Especially to you, Ravi. Didn't you say you wanted to go traveling with your daughter?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ravi... Asha's father...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ravi... Asha's father...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ravi... Asha's father...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a portion of yours and <color=#ffd34c>our</color> memory.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a portion of yours and <color=#ffd34c>our</color> memory.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a portion of yours and <color=#ffd34c>our</color> memory.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The fact that these memories can still be passed to you means that you can still be with us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The fact that these memories can still be passed to you means that you can still be with us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The fact that these memories can still be passed to you means that you can still be with us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please, join us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please, join us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please, join us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Become our sun once again and rid the world of this darkness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Become our sun once again and rid the world of this darkness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Become our sun once again and rid the world of this darkness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That is not what I asked.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That is not what I asked.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That is not what I asked.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We are those who purify the darkness before our eyes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We are those who purify the darkness before our eyes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We are those who purify the darkness before our eyes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you are the sun that guides us.94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you are the sun that guides us.94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you are the sun that guides us.94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am the first to receive a name from you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am the first to receive a name from you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am the first to receive a name from you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My name is Ravi, the flame that purifies evil. I can only hope that you remember me now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My name is Ravi, the flame that purifies evil. I can only hope that you remember me now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My name is Ravi, the flame that purifies evil. I can only hope that you remember me now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are not Ravi.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are not Ravi.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are not Ravi.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We purify the darkness before our eyes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We purify the darkness before our eyes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We purify the darkness before our eyes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And go forth with our noble mission. There is no regret here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And go forth with our noble mission. There is no regret here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And go forth with our noble mission. There is no regret here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you don't need to apologize to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, you don't need to apologize to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, you don't need to apologize to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am merely risking my life so Asha's future can be bright.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am merely risking my life so Asha's future can be bright.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am merely risking my life so Asha's future can be bright.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone who is as lukewarm and complicated as you does not deserve the name of the flame.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone who is as lukewarm and complicated as you does not deserve the name of the flame.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone who is as lukewarm and complicated as you does not deserve the name of the flame.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are Ahab. That's a name that befits you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are Ahab. That's a name that befits you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are Ahab. That's a name that befits you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You cannot ignite a flame like him, and I have never allowed that name to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You cannot ignite a flame like him, and I have never allowed that name to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You cannot ignite a flame like him, and I have never allowed that name to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see. It seems that you have forgotten about us when losing your memories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see. It seems that you have forgotten about us when losing your memories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see. It seems that you have forgotten about us when losing your memories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am Ravi.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am Ravi.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am Ravi.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have always been at the forefront, burning away all the darkness through your command.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have always been at the forefront, burning away all the darkness through your command.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have always been at the forefront, burning away all the darkness through your command.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The first flame!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The first flame!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The first flame!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is all right if you don't allow it.94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is all right if you don't allow it.94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is all right if you don't allow it.94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I will make you join us, even if it means using force!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I will make you join us, even if it means using force!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I will make you join us, even if it means using force!!
